nasb.text: Every bed on which the person with the discharge lies becomes unclean, and everything on which he sits becomes unclean.

esv.text: Every bed on which the one with the discharge lies shall be unclean, and everything on which he sits shall be unclean.

cnv.text: 有異常排泄的人睡過的床，都是不潔淨的；他坐過的家具，都必不潔淨。

ccb.text: 他睡过的床或坐过的东西都不洁净。
